title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: Cole Medin discusses the reported shutdown of Claude Fable 5 by US government order three days after launch, attributed to export-control directives and claimed jailbreak vulnerability. The video covers why the model was pulled, implications for developers, and benchmark comparisons against Opus 4.8.
writeup: Cole Medin covers the reported shutdown of Claude Fable 5, which was pulled by a US government order three days after launch. The summary attributes the move to export-control directives and a claimed jailbreak vulnerability, and the video explains why the model was withdrawn along with the implications for developers. It also includes benchmark comparisons against Opus 4.8.
